$comment: Sample MCP client configuration for the local Pieces OS server. Pieces OS
exposes its MCP endpoint over Streamable-HTTP at the URL below; the port
may differ on your machine — check Pieces OS settings if 39300 doesn't
answer. There are three supported ways to consume it from this repo:
3. Any other MCP client that speaks Streamable-HTTP — point it at the same
URL. The auth token is optional for local Pieces OS.

pieces.description: Local Pieces OS long-term memory. Tools include ask_pieces_ltm and others depending on your Pieces OS version — run `npm run ingest:pieces:list-tools` to enumerate them.

env.PIECES_QUERY: Summarize the most relevant memories, snippets, and references from my Pieces long-term memory.
